name: Title
example: Whole language / balanced literacy vs phonics / Science of Reading

name: Description
example: Research design used to estimate causal effects

name: Dek
description: Short editorial summary or better synthesis question
example: How do we guarantee code mastery without narrowing reading to decoding drills?

name: Claim Text
example: Reading First changed instruction but not broad comprehension scores.

name: Finding
example: Important agenda-setting reform but not a clean causal estimate.

name: Caveat
example: Review the original source for sample and outcome definitions.

name: Years / Scale
description: When and at what scale the initiative ran

name: Theory of Action
description: Mechanism by which the initiative is expected to affect outcomes
example: Annual testing and subgroup reporting pressure schools to improve.

name: Inputs Changed
description: Input variables changed by the initiative

name: Target Population
description: Population or setting affected by the initiative

name: Evaluation Designs
description: Free-text designs listed in the workbook

name: Normalization Issues
example: State tests can inflate or change across years.

name: Left Pole
description: Left side of the debate continuum

name: Right Pole
description: Right side of the debate continuum
example: Explicit code-based instruction plus language comprehension

name: Explanation
example: Strongly favors explicit code instruction while retaining comprehension.

name: Source File
description: Local source file for generated row

name: Local Key
description: Stable key before Geo UUID assignment
